description: Use this API to return the number of characters required to accommodate the data corresponding to the specified STRING entries, which can be for any of the a*Char data retrieval functions. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, nchars = get_char_length(string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR valid strings for the a*Char data retrieval functions to be used. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: nchars
return_values.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR entries containing the number of characters of each element of the array associated with the corresponding STRING value. (output).

error_codes.description: Position of an element in the array STRING that contains a value that is not recognized by any of the a*Char API routines.
